speaker: speaker1
text: Do you speak only English in the class , or does your teacher explain everything to you in Spanish ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Oh , we never speak Spanish in class ! Miss.Parker speaks to us only in English .

speaker: speaker1
text: I suppose she's right . Does she speak English very slowly ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Not always . Sometimes we don't understand her . Then she has to repeat what she said .

speaker: speaker1
text: It must be interesting to study English .

speaker: speaker2
text: Mario and I are the best students in the class . Miss.Parker says that my pronunciation is very good .

speaker: speaker1
text: Is English pronunciation easy or difficult ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sometimes it's difficult . Some words look different from the way one pronounces them .
